_comment: Recommended pi-blackhole config for openai-codex/gpt-5.5 daily driver; auto compaction; Cursor primary workers; non-Cursor fallbacks.

observerModel._comment: Cursor primary: cheap/fast thinking-capable model for frequent observation extraction.

observerFallbackModels._comment: Non-Cursor fallback for observer; cheap/fast Google model.
Second non-Cursor fallback for observer on another provider: DeepSeek V4 Pro with high thinking.

reflectorModel._comment: Claude Bridge primary: Haiku for synthesis/reflection.

reflectorFallbackModels._comment: Non-Cursor fallback for reflector; strong long-context max reasoning.
Second non-Cursor fallback for reflector on another provider.

dropperModel._comment: Cursor primary: cheap mini model with medium thinking for memory pruning/judgment.

dropperFallbackModels._comment: Non-Cursor fallback for dropper: DeepSeek V4 Pro with max thinking.
Second non-Cursor fallback for dropper on another provider.

_notes: Daily driver/session model: openai-codex/gpt-5.5, context window from pi --list-models: 272K.
compactAfterTokens: 180000 = fallback if the session model contextWindow is unavailable.

LOCAL PATCH 2026-06-26: compactAfterPercent: 0.65 makes auto-compaction threshold derive from the active session model contextWindow; reapply after pi-blackhole upgrades if lost. See ~/.pi/agent/pi-blackhole/LOCAL_PATCHES.md.
tailBehavior is pi-default only: blackhole still owns compaction, but Pi's gentler recent-tail cut is used.

Cursor observer/dropper primaries and Claude Bridge reflector primary all have 200K context. Observer primary is cursor/gpt-5.4-mini-low; dropper primary is cursor/gpt-5.4-mini-medium; reflector primary is claude-bridge/claude-haiku-4-5. The largest worker input cap is 160K = 80.0% of the worker context.
Fallbacks are deliberately non-Cursor so primary and fallback providers differ.
Final emergency fallback remains the session model because sessionFallback is true: openai-codex/gpt-5.5.
2026-06-12: Disabled debug/debugLog after transient Cursor proxy debugging; worker/fallback cooldownHours remain 1 hour.
